message:
Add comprehensive testing strategy beads to issue tracker

This commit adds 16 new beads defining a complete testing strategy for
the SLB project, covering unit tests, E2E integration tests, and CI
pipeline integration.

## Testing Strategy Overview

The testing strategy targets 90%+ coverage across all packages using
real SQLite databases (no mocks) and deterministic, fast-running tests.

## Beads Created

### Foundation
- simultaneous_launch_button-v2x: Test Infrastructure - Shared helpers, fixtures, assertions

### Unit Tests for 0% Coverage Packages (7 beads)
- simultaneous_launch_button-i8b: CLI Package (0% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-3z3: Config Package (0% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-6ac: Output Package (0% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-hxb: Git Package (0% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-4hy: Integrations Package (0% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-eik: TUI Package (0% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-l0f: Utils Package (0% → 90%)

### Unit Tests for Existing Coverage (3 beads)
- simultaneous_launch_button-6zj: Core Package (51% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-wr8: Daemon Package (54% → 90%)
- simultaneous_launch_button-djg: DB Package (62% → 90%)

### E2E Integration Tests (1 epic + 4 scenarios)
- simultaneous_launch_button-6fw: E2E Test Suite Epic
  - simultaneous_launch_button-6fw.1: Multi-Agent Approval Workflow
  - simultaneous_launch_button-6fw.2: Risk Tier Classification
  - simultaneous_launch_button-6fw.3: Session and Timeout Management
  - simultaneous_launch_button-6fw.4: Git Rollback Integration

### CI Integration
- simultaneous_launch_button-jl8: Comprehensive Test Pipeline

### Master Epic
- simultaneous_launch_button-7y5: Testing Strategy Epic (ties all together)

## Bead Characteristics

Each bead includes:
- Background and purpose explaining why the tests matter
- Current state analysis with coverage metrics
- Detailed test categories and scenarios
- Example logging output for debugging
- Dependencies on other beads
- Success criteria with measurable targets
- Implementation notes with code examples

## Dependency Structure

All testing beads depend on the Test Infrastructure bead (v2x) which
provides shared helpers. The E2E tests depend on unit tests being
complete first for cleaner debugging. CI integration depends on all
tests being implemented.

## Project Status

With these beads, the project now has:
- 47 closed beads (completed work)
- 38 open beads (remaining work including these 16 testing beads)
- Approximately 55% complete
